Analysis Pipeline
1
Camera Initialization & Calibration
⏳
2
Automated Image Acquisition
⏳
3
Image Preprocessing (CLAHE, Morphology)
⏳
4
Classical Image Segmentation (Watershed)
⏳
5
Grain Detection & Morphometric Measurement
⏳
6
Dataset-Level Statistical Analysis
⏳
7
Grain Classification (Type & Size)
⏳
8
Image-Level Quality Metrics
⏳
9
Report Generation (CSV, Excel, JSON, Plots)
⏳
10
Final Verdict & Grading
⏳
📷
